Kamino expanded RWA integration on Solana: Galaxy stock ($GLXY) now usable as collateral with USDC/CASH borrowing; OnRe reinsurance market surpassed $100M; RockawayX RWA vault exceeded $15M deposits across four lending protocols, offering diversified yield strategies.

Galaxy (NASDAQ: $GLXY) is now live in the @SuperstateInc Market on Kamino, bringing a NASDAQ-registered public equity onchain as usable collateral on @solana.

Eligible investors can borrow USDC and CASH against GLXY while maintaining full equity exposure and access to 24/7 https://t.co/JZhrlKSfcZ
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet's modest engagement (1.1% engagement rate) stems from limited emotional urgency and a niche use case—while the NASDAQ listing angle provides legitimacy and newsworthiness, the specific mechanic of using public equities as collateral appeals to a narrow segment of sophisticated users rather than triggering broad protocol interest or FOMO.

Reinsurance premiums are moving onchain, unlocking sustainable yield backed by real-world risk and uncorrelated returns, now accessible through DeFi.

RWAs are scaling on Kamino. https://t.co/KrKJA0b77I
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet leveraged a concrete milestone ($100M) combined with an aspirational narrative about RWAs and "uncorrelated returns"—appeals that resonate strongly with yield-focused DeFi users—but the relatively modest engagement-to-reach ratio (4.3% likes, 0.09% bookmarks) suggests the reinsurance use case lacks the immediate emotional urgency or clarity of more familiar DeFi primitives, limiting viral potential despite solid foundational interest.

The RockawayX RWA Vault has crossed $15M+ in deposits on Kamino.

Powered by @Rockaway_X, the vault delivers market-neutral yield, allocating USDC across four lending markets: OnRe, PRIME, Huma, and Solstice, targeting diversified real-world asset exposure. https://t.co/dLgHlhyU5k

The combination of T-bill yield backing and multi-source yield generation (lending interest, incentives, T-bills) at 4.5% APY is a strategically sophisticated product that Kamino should monitor closely as a competitive threat to its stablecoin lending market share.
